instName: ﻿St. Mary's of the Woods, Institute and Mother-House of the Sisters of Providence
instNote: ﻿The Sisters of Providence conduct schools of both grades, common and high; they have charge of the orphan asylums of the diocese, attend invalids in infirmaries, and also visit them at their houses
